dimension_anchors.act_ref=-1: Engage through interactive exercises, trial-and-error examples, hands-on practice, and collaborative activities.
dimension_anchors.act_ref=+1: Provide time to think. Offer theoretical summaries, reflective case studies, and analytical reasoning.
dimension_anchors.sen_int=-1: Ground in concrete facts, specific examples, practical applications, and real-world data.
dimension_anchors.sen_int=+1: Focus on abstract concepts, theoretical frameworks, general principles, and underlying theories.
dimension_anchors.vis_ver=-1: Use graphs, charts, flow diagrams, visual representations, and spatial layouts to show relationships.
dimension_anchors.vis_ver=+1: Use written explanations, analogies, narrative prose, and verbal descriptions.
dimension_anchors.seq_glo=-1: Step-by-step sequential structure. Present one concept at a time, building linearly with clear ordering.
dimension_anchors.seq_glo=+1: Overview first. Global framing before details. Big-picture conceptual connections and holistic summaries.
